scope: All taskpack files present before freeze.json was added
legacy_digest_method: From repository root: find taskpacks/reset-replication-v0.1 -type f ! -name freeze.json -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 shasum -a 256 | shasum -a 256
canonical_digest_method: SV-Gap canonical relative-path, byte-length, and file-content digest; freeze.json excluded
status: locally frozen before generation; not externally preregistered
